川原保吉門人小林宗至・Kawahara Yasukichi's disciple Kobayashi Muneyoshi

神壁算法[寛政1 (1789)]・藤田権平貞資閲 ; 藤田門彌嘉言編 ; 城崎庄右衛門方弘, 神谷幸吉定令訂：https://rmda.kulib.kyoto-u.ac.jp/item/rb00028551・Reference: Shinpeki Sanpo (1789), written by Fujita  Sadasuke; Edited by Fujita Monya Yoshiko; Revised by Kinosaki Shoemon Masahiro and Kamiya Kokichi: https://rmda.kulib.kyoto-u.ac.jp/item/rb00028551
